differentials.name: humeral shaft Prognosis:  anatomic neck fractures are associated with an increased risk of avascular necrosis. The PPV is 97% if combined with a medial metaphyseal fragment < 8 mm short and > 2 mm displaced.

context: @    Upper extremity Site:   inferior surface of medial femoral neck √  subtle lucency / sclerosis (= acute fracture) √  lucent line surrounded by sclerosis (= subacute fracture) ›  shaft: ballet, marching, long-distance running, gymnastics ›  distal metaphysis: endurance athlete (runner, soccer player, triathlete) ›  proximal diaphysis: running ›  middle + distal diaphysis: football, soccer, tennis, ballet, jogging ◊  Shin splint = early stress response √  vertical / oblique fracture orientation anterior to tuberosity √  vertically oriented fracture in midbody ◊  Midfoot fractures are difficu
